title: albizia lophantha
intro: Albizia lophantha, also known as the Japanese fir or East Indian walnut, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Albizia lophantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Albizia lophantha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
